title: Nominal Relative Clauses
description: WHAT, WHOEVER, WHEREVER, HOWEVER act as nouns inside a sentence.
summary_pt_br: Cláusulas nominais relativas: WHAT / WHOEVER / WHEREVER atuam como substantivo na frase.

scenes.subtitle_en: WHAT, WHOEVER, WHEREVER, HOWEVER act as nouns inside a sentence.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Cláusulas nominais relativas: WHAT / WHOEVER / WHEREVER atuam como substantivo na frase.

scenes.text_en: WHAT, WHOEVER, WHEREVER, HOWEVER act as nouns inside a sentence. Today's focus: nominal relative clauses. What matters most is how you treat people.
scenes.text_pt: Cláusulas nominais relativas: WHAT / WHOEVER / WHEREVER atuam como substantivo na frase. Foco de hoje: nominal relative clauses. O que mais importa é como você trata as pessoas.

scenes.title: Nominal Relative Clauses
scenes.body_en: 'What matters is your effort.' = 'The thing that matters'. 'Whoever arrives first wins.' = 'Any person who arrives'. These clauses replace noun phrases entirely.
scenes.body_pt: Cláusulas nominais relativas: WHAT / WHOEVER / WHEREVER atuam como substantivo na frase.

examples.en: What matters most is how you treat people.
examples.pt: O que mais importa é como você trata as pessoas.

examples.en: Whoever wrote this report deserves a raise.
examples.pt: Quem quer que tenha escrito esse relatório merece aumento.

examples.en: We will go wherever the train takes us.
examples.pt: Vamos onde o trem nos levar.

exercise.question: Complete: "What ___ most is how you treat people."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "What matters most is how you treat people."
exercise.hint_pt_br: O que mais importa é como você trata as pessoas.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I haven't heard anything about that.
Whoever wrote this report deserves a raise.
exercise.explanation: The correct sentence is: "Whoever wrote this report deserves a raise."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Quem quer que tenha escrito esse relatório merece aumento.

exercise.explanation: Five key terms from the lesson. Match each English word to its Portuguese meaning.

scenes.title: Nominal Relative Clauses — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre nominal relative clauses. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Let's practice. 'The person who arrives wins.' Use a nominal relative.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Try: 'The thing that matters is effort.'

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Now combine two ideas. Place and choice.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: We go wherever life takes us.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: You can explain it however you like.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Whatever you decide, I support you.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Nominal clauses turn whole ideas into single nouns.

scenes.title: Kumar's Saturday wisdom
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, detalhes e sua opinião. O professor vai ler e comentar.
scenes.prompt_en: Summarize Kumar's advice. Include at least two nominal relative clauses.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Resumo curto com quem falou, o que disseram e sua opinião.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: In Kumar's final class of the term, students gathered to hear a farewell full of quiet sentences.

paragraphs.speaker: Kumar
paragraphs.en: Whatever path you choose, let it be the one that scares you slightly more than it comforts you.

paragraphs.speaker: Student
paragraphs.en: And whoever decides to study abroad, should we write to you for advice?

paragraphs.speaker: Kumar
paragraphs.en: Write to me wherever you are. A teacher's email never really closes its doors.

paragraphs.speaker: Student
paragraphs.en: What matters to me is knowing that you truly believed we could grow.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Years later, his former students still recited those lines as if they were old family prayers.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "Nominal Relative Clauses". WHAT, WHOEVER, WHEREVER, HOWEVER act as nouns inside a sentence. What matters most is how you treat people. Whoever wrote this report deserves a raise. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key — listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice — listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: Prática: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "Nominal Relative Clauses". I liked it because it was clear and useful. See you next time!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule from last year
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "Nominal Relative Clauses".

scenes.title: Go deeper — free resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes gratuitas e confiáveis para continuar praticando. Salve os links e volte sempre.
